node_kinds.name: GCP_Organization
node_kinds.description: Root node of the GCP resource hierarchy.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Project
node_kinds.description: A GCP Project. Primary unit of resource grouping and billing.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Folder
node_kinds.description: A GCP resource hierarchy folder. IAM policies here are inherited by child projects.

node_kinds.name: GCP_User
node_kinds.description: A human Google identity with IAM bindings in GCP.

node_kinds.name: GCP_ServiceAccount
node_kinds.description: A GCP Service Account identity used by applications, VMs, or Cloud Functions.

node_kinds.name: GCP_GoogleManagedSA
node_kinds.description: A Google-managed service account automatically created for GCP services. Not directly controllable by users.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Group
node_kinds.description: A Google Group used as an IAM principal. Members inherit the group's IAM bindings.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Role
node_kinds.description: A GCP IAM Role (predefined or custom) that bundles permissions.

node_kinds.name: GCP_ServiceAccountKey
node_kinds.description: A user-managed key for a GCP Service Account. Represents persistent credential material.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Bucket
node_kinds.description: A Google Cloud Storage bucket. Common data exfiltration target.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Dataset
node_kinds.description: A BigQuery dataset. May contain sensitive data.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Secret
node_kinds.description: A secret in GCP Secret Manager. High-value credential theft target.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Function
node_kinds.description: A serverless Cloud Function. Runs as a service account; privilege escalation vector.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Instance
node_kinds.description: A GCP Compute Engine VM instance. May run as a service account.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Cluster
node_kinds.description: A Google Kubernetes Engine cluster.

node_kinds.name: GCP_SQLInstance
node_kinds.description: A Cloud SQL managed database instance.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Network
node_kinds.description: A GCP Virtual Private Cloud network.

node_kinds.name: GCP_Firewall
node_kinds.description: A GCP VPC firewall rule controlling network access.

node_kinds.name: GCP_KMSKey
node_kinds.description: A GCP Cloud KMS cryptographic key. Access enables decryption of sensitive data.

node_kinds.name: GCP_LogSink
node_kinds.description: A GCP Cloud Logging sink. May expose sensitive audit data.

node_kinds.name: GCP_LogBucket
node_kinds.description: A GCP Cloud Logging storage bucket for log retention.

node_kinds.name: GCP_LogMetric
node_kinds.description: A GCP log-based metric monitoring sensitive operations.

node_kinds.name: GCP_PubSubTopic
node_kinds.description: A GCP Pub/Sub messaging topic.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_OwnsProject
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has roles/owner. Full project control including IAM — can grant any role. Source can follow all outbound edges from the project.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_ManageProjectIAM
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has projectIamAdmin, securityAdmin, or orgAdmin. Can setIamPolicy to grant themselves owner — full project control.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_ManageProjectCompute
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has compute.admin. Can create VMs with any project SA attached — full control of any SA in the project and its outbound paths.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanImpersonate
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has iam.serviceAccounts.actAs. Can generate tokens and act as the target SA, inheriting all its permissions and outbound attack paths.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanCreateKeys
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has iam.serviceAccountKeys.create. Creates a persistent long-lived key — authenticate as the SA indefinitely. Full SA control.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanGetAccessToken
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has iam.serviceAccounts.getAccessToken. Generates a short-lived OAuth token to act as the SA immediately — full SA control in that window.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanModifyIamPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has iam.serviceAccounts.setIamPolicy on the target SA. Can grant themselves actAs permission — leading to full SA control.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanManageSA
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has serviceAccountAdmin or equivalent. Can create, delete, update SAs, and set their IAM policies — full control of the SA.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanModifyProjectPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has resourcemanager.projects.setIamPolicy. Can grant themselves roles/owner on the project — full project control.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_HighPrivilegeServiceAccount
relationship_kinds.description: SA has CRITICAL or HIGH privilege on the project (roles/owner or escalation-capable roles). SA can act as the project's administrator.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanReadSecrets
relationship_kinds.description: Identity has secretmanager.versions.access on the secret. Can read the secret value — a terminal attack goal. Secret values often contain credentials enabling further lateral movement.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanEditProject
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has roles/editor — can create/modify resources but NOT set IAM. Does not give full project control. Supporting edge; use Cypher to find escalation paths via compute/function creation.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanViewProject
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Read-only access to a GCP project. No control of destination.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_HasRoleOnProject
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has a custom or service-scoped IAM role. May not confer meaningful control — informational edge for Cypher exploration.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_AdministerProject
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has a generic admin role (not owner or IAM admin). Partial control — kept non-traversable to avoid false positive paths.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_ManageProjectStorage
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has storage.admin. Controls bucket policies only, not the full project.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_ManageProjectBigQuery
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has bigquery.admin. Controls BigQuery datasets only, not the full project.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanSignBlob
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has iam.serviceAccounts.signBlob — signs arbitrary data as the SA. Partial capability; alone does not give full SA control. Supporting edge (combine with others via post-processing or Cypher).

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanSignJWT
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has iam.serviceAccounts.signJwt — signs JWTs as the SA for service-to-service auth. Partial capability; not full SA control. Supporting edge.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanModifyBucketPoliciesInProject
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has storage.buckets.setIamPolicy project-wide. Gives access to bucket data only; does not give full project control.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanCreateComputeInstance
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has compute.instances.create. Can deploy a VM with an attached SA — escalation path to SA control, but the destination node is the project (not the SA). Use Cypher to trace to the target SA.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanChangeInstanceServiceAccount
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has compute.instances.setServiceAccount. Can hijack the SA on an existing VM — escalation to SA control. Destination is project; use Cypher to find the SA.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanCreateCloudFunction
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has cloudfunctions.functions.create. Can deploy a function running as a SA — escalation to SA control. Destination is project; use Cypher to trace the SA.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanReadSecretMetadata
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has secretmanager.secrets.get (metadata only, not secret values). Cannot exploit the secret value. Supporting edge.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanReadSecretsInProject
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity has project-wide Secret Manager read access. Can read secrets but does not give full project control. Supporting edge.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_ContainsServiceAccount
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Structural: a GCP project contains this service account. Project boundary does not imply attack control of the SA.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_OwnsStorageBucket
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Structural: a GCP project owns this storage bucket. Project ownership does not directly give read/write access to bucket contents.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_OwnsSecret
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Structural: a GCP project owns this secret. Project boundary does not directly give access to secret values.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_OwnsDataset
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Structural: a GCP project owns this BigQuery dataset. Informational containment edge.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_HasGoogleOwnedSA
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Informational: project uses a Google-managed SA. Not user-controllable.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanAccessLogStream
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. Identity can read a GCP log stream. Reading logs is reconnaissance, not control of the sink or its resources.

relationship_kinds.name: GCP_CanViewSensitiveLogs
relationship_kinds.description: NON-TRAVERSABLE. SA with logging permissions can view sensitive log data. Reading logs does not control the log sink.
